data.title: Trump's attempt to fire Federal Reserve Gov. Lisa Cook had minimal market impact; S&P 500 unaffected.
data.description: President Trump's decision to dismiss Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook did not have a significant impact on the market on Tuesday. However, if his attempt to take control of the Fed is successful, the consequences are expected to escalate. The firing of Cook has not affected the S&P 500 as of now, but the potential repercussions are a concern for investors and the business community.

data.title: President Trump claims firing Federal Reserve Gov. Lisa Cook, she rebutted saying he lacks authority.
data.description: Late on Monday, President Donald Trump announced that he is terminating Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook from her position. Cook responded saying that he does not have the power to do so. The news was shared on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Fed Chair Powell hints at rate cuts, S&P 500 rises; Market sees 70% odds of rate cut next month.
data.description: There is a prevalent anticipation in the markets for a potential rate reduction next month, with the likelihood now standing at approximately 70%. Following Federal Reserve Chair Powell's indication that current conditions could justify rate cuts, the S&P 500 experienced a surge in response to his speech at Jackson Hole.

data.title: PPI inflation surge dampens Fed rate-cut expectations; Trump seeks significant half-point drop. S&P 500 declines.
data.description: The current administration under Trump is advocating for a 0.5% decrease in the upcoming month. Following higher than expected Producer Price Index (PPI) inflation data, expectations for a significant rate cut by the Federal Reserve have diminished. This economic development resulted in a decline in the S&P 500 index.

data.title: Core CPI inflation exceeds 3%, but won't deter Fed from rate cuts; S&P 500 increases.
data.description: Core CPI inflation has seen an increase, surpassing the 3% mark recently. Despite the rise, it is not significant enough to hinder the Federal Reserve from implementing rate cuts. The S&P 500 index experienced a rise following this news.

data.title: Job cuts surged by 140% from last year in July, as per new data. The Fed's inflation gauge exceeded expectations. S&P 500 rose.
data.description: In July, new data revealed a 140% surge in job cuts compared to the previous year. The Federal Reserve's preferred inflation measure exceeded expectations. Concurrently, the S&P 500 index experienced a rise.

data.title: Fed could consider rate cut after EU tariff deal and President Trump's trade deals ease inflation concerns.
data.description: The Federal Reserve could become less concerned about inflation driven by tariffs following President Trump's recent series of trade agreements. This development may potentially lead the Fed to consider the possibility of a rate cut after a deal regarding tariffs with the EU.

data.title: LVNBA and Christian Bishop team up to support 20 students from Black community at HBCU Classic.
data.description: In Las Vegas on October 24, 2025, the Las Vegas Chapter of the National Bar Association (LVNBA) revealed a significant collaboration with Christian Bishop, a prominent community figure and contender for Nevada Assembly District 29. This partnership aims to support and facilitate the participation of 20 students from the Black community.

data.title: New from Gala Games: VEXI Retro Radiowaves Collection, inspired by the 80s and 90s, includes Workforce & Mini Packs.
data.description: Gala Games has launched a new collection called VEXI Retro Radiowaves, which draws inspiration from the colorful decades of the 80s and 90s. This collection includes Workforce and Mini Packs tailored for digital fans.

data.title: ADP jobs report signals slow hiring, jobless claims up, supporting Fed rate cut expectations.
data.description: The latest ADP jobs report and initial jobless claims contribute to a series of weak labor market indicators, heightening expectations for prompt Federal Reserve interest rate cuts. The post-ADP Jobs Report reveals sluggish hiring, with jobless claims on the rise, supporting forecasts for Fed rate reductions, as stated in Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Community Health Systems sells 3 PA hospitals to Tenor Health Foundation: 186-bed Regional Hospital of Scranton, 122-bed Moses Taylor Hospital, and 369-bed Wilkes-Barre General Hospital.
data.description: In Franklin, Tennessee, Community Health Systems, Inc. (NYSE: CYH) revealed a deal where its subsidiaries will sell Regional Hospital of Scranton (186 beds) and Moses Taylor Hospital (122 beds) in Scranton, Pennsylvania, along with Wilkes-Barre General Hospital (369 beds) in Wilkes-Barre, Pennsylvania, and associated businesses to affiliates of Tenor Health Foundation. This move comes after the planned sale to WoodBridge Healthcare, Inc. Total facilities being sold: - Regional Hospital of Scranton (186 beds) - Moses Taylor Hospital (122 beds) - Wilkes-Barre General Hospital (369 beds) Buyer: Affiliates of Tenor Health Foundation Previous divestiture: WoodBridge Healthcare, Inc.

data.title: Stock market reaches new highs with Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq after cool CPI data; index prices surge.
data.description: Following the release of lower-than-expected Consumer Price Index (CPI) numbers, the Dow Jones index, alongside other major indexes such as the S&P 500 and Nasdaq, surged to record highs. This resulted in a significant milestone for the stock market today, as the Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq all closed at new peaks. This positive trend was triggered by the cool CPI data, reflecting a total shift in market sentiment towards optimism and confidence in economic growth.
Scope: US ratings downgrade driven by weakening of governance standards, especially erosion of well-established checks and balances

data.title: 374Water seeks approval for discretionary reverse stock split in preliminary proxy filing.
data.description: "In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a low of 3.8%, marking a significant decrease from the previous year. The number of jobless individuals has dropped to 6.7 million, with the labor force participation rate increasing to 62.3%. The report also highlighted that the economy added 215,000 new jobs in the last month, surpassing expectations. Analysts predict further positive growth in the job market in the upcoming months."

data.title: Stock market at record highs with huge earnings from Apple, Meta, Microsoft. Fed rate and Trump-Xi meeting looming.
data.description: Stocks are soaring to all-time highs amidst major earnings reports from tech giants Apple, Meta, and Microsoft. Additionally, investors are awaiting a Federal Reserve rate decision and a crucial meeting between former presidents Trump and Xi. This news marks a significant moment in the market as companies continue to showcase their financial strength. The post highlights the current positive sentiment in the stock market, with key events like earnings releases, central bank decisions, and geopolitical meetings shaping investor expectations.
Paul Mueller Co. reports Q3 earnings for 2025, exceeding expectations with a 15% rise in revenue.

data.title: AltaPointe Health partners with MyCare Tech, Mobile Police, and Fire-Rescue to launch iPad pilot program to reduce non-emergency 911 calls in Mobile, Ala.
data.description: In Mobile, Alabama, on October 24, 2025, AltaPointe Health collaborated with MyCare Technologies, the Mobile Police Department, and Mobile Fire-Rescue to introduce a pilot initiative. This program targets the reduction of non-emergency 911 calls and enhancing access to behavioral healthcare services.

data.title: Lonely Planet announces top 50 travel destinations and experiences for 2026. New publication reveals list.
data.description: Travel enthusiasts are buzzing as a renowned travel authority, Lonely Planet, announces the top 50 destinations and experiences for the upcoming year in their latest publication. Released in New York on October 24, 2025, the list showcases the best options for travelers to explore in the near future. Lonely Planet's Best Publication highlights exciting locations and activities that are must-visits for those seeking new adventures. This unveiling has stirred up excitement among wanderlust individuals looking to plan their next trip, with the curated list providing valuable insights into the hottest travel trends.
Paul Mueller Company declares quarterly cash dividend for shareholders.
Paul Mueller Co.'s Board OKs Share Buyback Program.
